Package com.longbridge.dca

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    DcaCalcDateOptions
    Options for DcaContext.calcDate(com.longbridge.dca.DcaCalcDateOptions).
    DcaCalcDateResult
    Response for DcaContext.calcDate(com.longbridge.dca.DcaCalcDateOptions).
    DcaContext
    Dollar-cost averaging (DCA) plan management context.
    DcaCreateOptions
    Options for DcaContext.createDca(com.longbridge.dca.DcaCreateOptions).
    DcaCreateResult
    Result of creating or updating a DCA plan.
    DcaHistoryOptions
    Options for DcaContext.history(com.longbridge.dca.DcaHistoryOptions).
    DcaHistoryRecord
    One DCA execution record.
    DcaHistoryResponse
    Response for DcaContext.history(com.longbridge.dca.DcaHistoryOptions).
    DcaList
    Response for DcaContext.list(com.longbridge.dca.DcaListOptions) and write operations.
    DcaListOptions
    Options for DcaContext.list(com.longbridge.dca.DcaListOptions).
    DcaPlan
    One DCA (dollar-cost averaging) investment plan.
    DcaStats
    Response for DcaContext.stats(java.lang.String).
    DcaSupportInfo
    DCA support info for one security.
    DcaSupportList
    Response for DcaContext.checkSupport(java.lang.String[]).
    DcaUpdateOptions
    Options for DcaContext.updateDca(com.longbridge.dca.DcaUpdateOptions).
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    DCAFrequency
    Dollar-cost averaging investment frequency.
    DCAStatus
    DCA plan status.
